items.verse: وَمَن يَرْغَبُ عَن مِّلَّةِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِلَّا مَن سَفِهَ نَفْسَهُ...
وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُ إِسْحَاقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ وَجَعَلْنَا فِي ذُرِّيَّتِهِ النُّبُوَّةَ...

verse.ayah: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُ إِسْحَاقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ ۚ كُلًّا هَدَيْنَا ۚ وَنُوحًا هَدَيْنَا مِن قَبْلُ ۖ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِهِ دَاوُودَ...
verse.en: And We gave to Him Isaac and Jacob - all [of them] We guided. And Noah We guided before; and among his descendants, David...

items.verse: حُرِّمَتْ عَلَيْكُمُ الْمَيْتَةُ وَالدَّمُ وَلَحْمُ الْخِنزِيرِ...
حُرِّمَتْ عَلَيْكُمُ الْمَيْتَةُ وَالدَّمُ وَلَحْمُ الْخِنزِيرِ...
حُرِّمَتْ عَلَيْكُمُ الْمَيْتَةُ وَالدَّمُ وَلَحْمُ الْخِنزِيرِ...

items.en: What is sacrificed to other than Allah

verse.ayah: حُرِّمَتْ عَلَيْكُمُ الْمَيْتَةُ وَالدَّمُ وَلَحْمُ الْخِنزِيرِ وَمَا أُهِلَّ لِغَيْرِ اللَّهِ بِهِ...
verse.en: Prohibited to you are dead animals, blood, the flesh of swine, and that which has been dedicated to other than Allah...

items.verse: فِيهَا أَنْهَارٌ مِّن مَّاءٍ غَيْرِ آسِنٍ...

verse.ayah: مَثَلُ الْجَنَّةِ الَّتِي وُعِدَ الْمُتَّقُونَ ۖ فِيهَا أَنْهَارٌ مِّن مَّاءٍ غَيْرِ آسِنٍ وَأَنْهَارٌ مِّن لَّبَنٍ لَّمْ يَتَغَيَّرْ طَعْمُهُ وَأَنْهَارٌ مِّنْ خَمْرٍ لَّذَّةٍ لِّلشَّارِبِينَ وَأَنْهَارٌ مِّنْ عَسَلٍ مُّصَفًّى...
verse.en: The example of Paradise promised to the righteous: therein are rivers of water unaltered, rivers of milk unchanging in taste, rivers of wine delicious to drinkers, and rivers of purified honey...

verse.ayah: وَهُوَ الَّذِي أَنشَأَ جَنَّاتٍ مَّعْرُوشَاتٍ وَغَيْرَ مَعْرُوشَاتٍ وَالنَّخْلَ وَالزَّرْعَ مُخْتَلِفًا أُكُلُهُ وَالزَّيْتُونَ وَالرُّمَّانَ مُتَشَابِهًا وَغَيْرَ مُتَشَابِهٍ...
verse.en: And it is He who produces gardens trellised and untrellised, and date-palms and crops of different [kinds of] food, and olives and pomegranates, similar and dissimilar...

wordle.hint: This word signifies knowledge and is highly valued in Islam.
wordle.verse: Al-Baqarah 2:255 — Allah is the Eternal, the Sustainer of all existence. He is not overtaken by sleep or fatigue. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is it that can intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is before them and what will be after them, and they encompass not a thing of His knowledge except for what He wills.
wordle.arabicVerse: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۗ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِندَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ ۖ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۖ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْكَبِيرُ

deduction.title: The Enigma of the Great Flood
deduction.intro: In a time of great disobedience and corruption, a faithful servant of Allah faced an immense challenge. With a heavy heart, he warned his people of the impending doom, but they turned a deaf ear. This story unfolds with trials, perseverance, and a miraculous event that changed the course of humanity.
clues: Clue 1: This story involves a significant warning to a sinful community.
Clue 2: The main figure is known for his unwavering faith amidst ridicule.
Clue 3: A massive construction plays a pivotal role in this narrative.
Clue 4: This event is often associated with a divine punishment in the form of water.
Clue 5: The figure's plea to his people was met with mockery and disbelief.
Clue 6: This prophet is famously known for building an ark to save himself and the believers.
deduction.verse: And We certainly saved Noah and those with him in the laden ark, and We drowned the others. Indeed, in that is a sign, and most of them were not to be believers. (Surah Al-Mu'minun: 27)
deduction.arabic: وَأَنْجَيْنَا نُوحًا وَالَّذِينَ مَعَهُ فِي الْفُلْكِ الْمَشْحُونِ ۖ وَغَرَقْنَا الْآخَرِينَ ۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ

words: To Him belongs what is in the heavens
scramble.arabic: ٱللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ٱلْحَيُّ ٱلْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَهُ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِي ٱلْأَرْضِ
scramble.hint: This verse emphasizes the uniqueness and oneness of Allah, highlighting His eternal nature and sovereignty.
